sql: GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO analytics_viewer;
CREATE ROLE analytics_viewer WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'analytics123' CONNECTION LIMIT 5;
CREATE ROLE app_migrations WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'migrate123' CREATEDB; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO app_migrations;
CREATE ROLE app_service WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'service123' CONNECTION LIMIT 20; GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO app_service;
CREATE ROLE app_readonly WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'readonly123' CONNECTION LIMIT 10; GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO app_readonly;
